disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe unilateral flank pain radiating to the groin/testicle
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain, and does it spread anywhere?
Does the pain go down into your groin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's in my right side and back, and it shoots straight down into my groin and testicle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Extreme restlessness — constantly pacing and unable to find any comfortable position
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to lie still, or do you need to keep moving?
Does any position help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stay still at all, I just keep pacing and shifting, nothing helps.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pink-tinged (macroscopic) haematuria noticed on last void
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in your urine?
What colour was your urine last time you went?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, actually — it looked pink-tinged last time I went.

trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or chills/shivering?
Do you feel hot or feverish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't think I've had any fever or chills.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ibuprofen taken about an hour ago with zero relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any pain relief, and did it help at all?
What have you tried for the pain so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some ibuprofen about an hour ago and it's done absolutely nothing.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: This pain is unbearable — can you just call an ambulance? I can't take it anymore.
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Should validate the severity of the pain and acknowledge simple oral analgesia hasn't worked, while explaining that in the absence of fever or other red flags, urgent same-day in-person review (for stronger analgesia and to confirm the diagnosis) rather than an ambulance is generally the appropriate next step — though calling 000 remains reasonable if the patient/partner feels this is the only way to access timely pain relief, particularly given oral analgesia has already failed.
